introSection: Coaster is a wooden roller coaster currently located at Playland in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was featured in the 2004 movie Riding the Bullet.

The ride received ACE Roller Coaster Landmark status from American Coaster Enthusiasts on 11 July 2009.

fullText:
Coaster is a wooden roller coaster currently located at Playland in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada.

The ride was featured in the 2004 movie Riding the Bullet.

The ride received ACE Roller Coaster Landmark status from American Coaster Enthusiasts on 11 July 2009.
